      • scanDirective

        public static AwaitAgent.WaitDirective scanDirective​(Term directive)
        atom String 状態の wait directive を解析する。 
           _directive_ ::= _head_(_target_,_how_,_until_)
   _head_      ::= "WAIT_UNTIL" | "WAIT_FOR"
   _how_       ::= ???
   _until_     ::= _eventTag_ | _duration_

      • scanDirective

        public static AwaitAgent.WaitDirective scanDirective​(java.lang.String directive)
